Restaurant_Receipt_May2024: Proof of purchase from Central East Asia Cuisine on May 30, 2024, confirming the plaintiff ordered the Big Plate Whole Chicken dish.
Dental_Xray_Post_Incident: X-ray images taken immediately after the incident showing the fracture in the tooth, proving the physical injury was caused by the foreign object in the food.
Dental_Treatment_Invoices: Detailed billing statements totaling approximately $4500 for the tooth extraction and dental implant procedure to substantiate economic damages.
Witness_Statements_Friends: Signed declarations from the two friends present at the dinner who witnessed the plaintiff's immediate reaction and the staff's apology.
Pre_Incident_Dental_Records: Historical dental records showing the tooth was in good health prior to May 30, 2024, to counter any defense claims of pre-existing conditions.
Communication_Log_Restaurant: Record of any emails, texts, or notes regarding the notification of the staff and their subsequent response or apology at the scene.
